name: @borjie/jurisdiction-profiles
description: Universal Jurisdiction Profile + Compliance Framework registry (Wave UNIV-1, Mr. Mwikila). Pluggable registry of country/subdivision rule-sets (`tz`, `gb-eng`, `us-ca`, …) + named compliance regulations (`gdpr`, `tz_dpa_2022`, `ccpa`, `lgpd`, `pipl`, `pdpa_sg`, `dpdp_in`, `ke_dpa_2019`, `ndpa_2023`, `popia`, `kvkk`, `lfpdppp`, `pipeda`, `appi`, `hipaa`, `ferpa`, `coppa`). Implements Docs/DESIGN/UNIVERSAL_JURISDICTION_SPEC.md.
